name: Dragonmaid's Soul!?
desc:
Send 1 "Dragonmaid" monster from your Deck or Extra Deck to the GY; Special Summon 1 Dragon monster from your Deck with the same Type as that monster.

You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Dragon monster in either GY; Special Summon it, but send it to the GY during the End Phase, or if you control a "Dragonmaid" monster, take control of 1 monster your opponent controls until the End Phase. You can only use 1 "Dragonmaid's Soul!?" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
strings: Send 1 Dragonmaid monster to the GY; Special Summon 1 Dragon monster from your Deck.
Special Summon 1 Dragon monster from either GY.
Take control of 1 monster your opponent controls until the End Phase.
